title: acer italum var. neapolitanum
intro: Acer italum var. neapolitanum is a lesser-known variety of the Italian maple tree, scientifically classified as Acer italum, and native to the Campania region in Italy. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin issues and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Acer italum var. neapolitanum include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, which are often used topically to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
